titleStmt.title: SII 24.435: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 435. (A.R. No. 111 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of two villages •••• and Iḍaikkuḍi in the name of Achyutarāya Mahārāyar and Chikka Rāyar for the various offerings to the god Eṁberumāṉār Tiruvēṅgaḍanātha at Ellaikkarai, consecrated by Tirumalai-Nāyakar, son of Kachchi Viśvanātha-Nāyakar. The gift includes the provisions made for the several servants of the temple. Though the details of the date are not complete, the cyclic year Viḷambi, the day, tithi and nakshatra along with the Śaka year ending in 60, help us to fix the date as Śaka 1460 Viḷambi corresponding to A.D. 1538 November 13 (Kārttika 14), Wednesday, (ba. 7) ·22, ·66.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 6 10 Itaṉ viḷampi sa ttu saptamiyum putavāramum peṟṟa makhānakṣatrattu ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā raṅgan tiruppatiyil Ellaikkaraiyil cuvāmi Accuta Irāyamahārāyar cikkarāyar tarmmam
Āka kacci viśvavanādhaṉāyakkar puttiran tirumalaiṉāyakkar pratiṣṭaiyāka ccutarāyamahārā nviśvanātanāya Inta Emperumāṉār tiruveṅkaṭanātaṉukku Amutuceytaruḷavum caṉṉativaipavaṅkaḷu lamum Amutu ceytaruḷa taḷikai 3 kku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl n=ta Āka
varuṣam 1- kku mātam 10 2- kkupoṉ4 100 2 10-100kku pu1- kku-poṉ2 vilai kku poṉ 2 10 1¥ nāḷ1 kku ney Amutu n=ta payaṟu poṉ 1¥ teṅkāy vāḻaippaḻa vilai pu 9¥ vella vilai viṭṭa cāttuppaṭi cantaṉam kaṟpūram kuṅku Aṭaikkāy Amutu Ilai A ṇi vilai pu 4 Eṇṇai vilai poṉ 3 pu 6 cātti Aruḷparivaṭṭam vilaikku 2 tirumālai
tiruviḷakku Aṟaikāval Ūḻiyam Aḻakiya maṇavāḷajiyar śiṣyan Appayaṉūkku Ilakkai kkupoṉ3pu6¥ Erikarumpu vilai poṉ 3 pu 6 Āka Amutuceytaruḷukiṟa kaṭṭaḷai cilavu poṉ 4 10 4pu4¥ paṭittaram koyil ṉappaṭi kku poṉ 3pu6¥ paricārakam Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ paṭi kku poṉ 2pu4 10kkupoṉ 2 10¥ koyil Aṭiyār per 2- kku poṉ 1 naṭṭuvar per 3kku poṉ 3 pu 6 muṭṭukkāraṉ
peril muṭuttāppu per 2 kku poṉ 1 2vacca cemakkalam tirucciṉṉam per 2 kku poṉ 2 pu 4 Āka paṭittaram poṉ 51 pu6 Āka varuṣam 1 kku Amutu ceytaruḷukiṟa kaṭṭaḷaikku caṉṉativai ccetta tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi vaṭakarai maḻanāṭu kiḻaimuṟi kūṟṟattu ṉmalicirmai ka kuṭi kiṟāmam 1 Āka kiṟāmam 2 Inta kiṟāmam Iraṇṭukku Iṉṉāṅkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa naṉcey
puṉcey nattam paṭukai Uḷpaṭa Ūr 2kku prākku tāṉamāṉiyam niṅkalāka niṉṟa naṉcey puṉcey nattam paṭukai tiṭar Uḷpaṭa tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka Aṉūpavittuk koṇṭu Inta toṟum Amutuceytaruḷukiṟa kaṭṭaḷaiyum kai kaṭṭaḷaiyum tamakku tiruviṭai Iṭaikkuṭi kiṟāmam 1 Āka kiṟāmam Iraṇṭukku Iṉṉāṅkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nidhinikṣepajalapāṣāṇa
akṣiṇyākāmi sitthisātthyam yeṉṉappaṭṭa Aṣṭapoka deśasvāmiyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa Ācandrārkkasthāyi Ākayaṉupavittu koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Inta tiruve ḻiya peṟku kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa koyilk keḻvi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷajiya taḷikai ḷvaṉu kku paricārakam Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukku poṉ § tirumālai tiruviḷa
ḷ Aṟai kāval Appaiyaṉukku poṉ 7- m perumāḷ Aṭiyār per dha- kku� 5 Uvaccaṉ 2 toppuvaittavaṉukku kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyar kku 2 kucava yaperkaḷukku kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭiyāle ca yam cantāṉaparamparai Inta cilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇa n Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
